regions.label: Opening Drive
regions.thesis: Acceptance from the open sets the first liquidity shelf.
regions.detail: Opening run spans 09:30 to 09:55, anchoring the first tradable impulse.

regions.label: Momentum Bend
regions.thesis: Momentum turns bullish as the early trend absorbs participation.
regions.detail: The 10:00-11:55 pocket checks whether the first move is extending or compressing.

regions.label: Daily Shelf
regions.thesis: Repeated reactions cluster near 236.54 and define the session shelf.
regions.detail: The shelf is derived from the local high window between 14:40 and 15:15.

regions.label: Risk Cone
regions.thesis: Risk expands while price rotates through a 1.4 point rejection band.
regions.detail: The risk cone is pinned to the high-response window from 14:55 to 15:55.

regions.label: Auction Drift
regions.thesis: Late auction drift resolves bullish into the closing mark.
regions.detail: The closing read follows the final regular-session sequence from 14:25 to 15:55.
